items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell. ALB down over 4%, SQM down 3%, SGML down over 2%.

items.headline: Albemarle - Citi raises to Buy, target $225
items.snippet: Citi raised ALB from High Risk to Buy. Target $225. Market underestimating growth potential. Lithium market unlikely to shift to significant oversupply.

items.headline: Does Albemarle Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB expects lithium demand CAGR of 10-20% from 2025-2030. Higher lithium prices from strong demand and supply disruptions. Q1 2026 sales up 33% YoY, EBITDA up 148%.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years. RBC Capital Markets boosted price target to $257/share, reiterated outperform. Expects 2026/2027 EBITDA of $2.8B and $2.9B. Lithium supply expected to remain tight through 2027.
